text.title: Freelance SaaS Billing Decision Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for Freelance SaaS Billing Decision.

step.name: pick-shape
step.action: Apply tree to pick subscription / usage / hybrid.

step.name: draft-kill-criteria
step.action: Define numeric trigger to revisit (e.g. median expansion below 1.1x in 6m).

step.name: publish-pricing-math
step.action: Write unit-math copy for pricing page. ≥20 chars; transparent.

step.name: schedule-reassessment
step.action: Calendar-gate at 100 customers OR +180 days. Update reassessment_at.
